holdings.infoBox: XME is an equity ETF with a total of 39 individual holdings. The top holdings are Nucor stock at 6.13%, Steel Dynamics at 6.12%, Cleveland-Cliffs at 5.70%, Reliance at 5.47%, and Warrior Met Coal at 4.68%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR S&P Metals & Mining ETF (XME) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in materials equity. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of US metals and mining companies. XME was launched on Jun 19, 2006 and is issued by State Street.
infoTable: S&P Metals and Mining Select Industry

data.title: 2 Sectors Where the Ultra-Wealthy Are Putting Their Money
data.text: Family offices poured more than $3 billion into tech, media, and telecom companies. But materials attracted the most capital—$4.8 billion.

data.title: This Surprising Sector Has Slid During the Iran War
data.text: The SPDR S&P Metals and Mining ETF has fallen nearly 6% since the Iran conflict began as higher oil prices and economic slowdown fears weigh on metals demand.
